basic_details.job_title: DSACS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 31 Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Staff Nurse, Lab Technician and More Positions
basic_details.short_information: Delhi State AIDS Control Society (DSACS) has released the official Staff Nurse, Lab Technician, and More Positions Notification 2026 on 22 April 2026 at dsacs.delhi.gov.in. A total of 31 vacancies have been announced under the DSACS Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 25 to 65 years with qualifications ranging from Graduate to PhD can apply online from 22 April 2026 to 23 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Deputy Director, TI/Prevention: Maximum age 62 years. Dy. Director, ICTC/BSD: Maximum age 62 years. Dy. Director, Lab. Serv.: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director, ICTC/BSD: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director, TI/Prevention: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director, SI: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director, IEC: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director, Doc.: Maximum age 62 years. Assistant Director YA: Maximum age 25 years. Laboratory Technician: Maximum age 62 years. Counsellor: Maximum age 62 years. Lab Technician: Maximum age 62 years. Technical Officer: Maximum age 62 years. Laboratory Technician: Maximum age 62 years. Clinical Services Officer: Maximum age 45 years. Data Monitoring and Documentation Officer: Maximum age 45 years. Cluster Prevention Officer: Maximum age 45 years. Medical Officer: Maximum age 65 years. Staff Nurse: Maximum age 62 years.

qualification.details: Deputy Director, TI/Prevention: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 5 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Dy. Director, ICTC/BSD: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience of 5 years in Public health programme with focus on EVTHS, HIV counselling and Testing services, early infant diagnosis services and engagement with key populations and affected communities at National/State/District level with Govt. / NGO/Development Partners implementing agencies/Private Sector. Dy. Director, Lab. Serv.: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience of 5 years in Public health programme with focus on EVTHS, HIV counselling and Testing services, early infant diagnosis services and engagement with key populations and affected communities at National/State/District level with Govt. / NGO/Development Partners implementing agencies/Private Sector. Assistant Director, ICTC/BSD: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Assistant Director, TI/Prevention: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Assistant Director, SI: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Assistant Director, IEC: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Assistant Director, Doc.: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Assistant Director YA: Master/Post Graduate Diploma in Social Sciences/Public Health/Health Care Administration and similar streams from a Recognized University. Work experience 3 years in the Development sector, Health Programmes or Health systems in the field of HIV/AIDS at State/National level with experience of engagement with Community and civil society organizations. Laboratory Technician: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT)/BMLS OR Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT)/DMLS. 2 years of experience working in any diagnostic laboratory for candidates with M.Sc/B. Tech in the above mentioned subjects. Candidates with experience of working in accredited labs or those labs who have applied for accreditation will be preferred. Counsellor: Graduate degree holder in Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/ Anthropology/Human development/Nursing with 3 years of experience in counseling/educating under National Health Programme OR, Post-graduate in Psychology/Social Work/Sociology/ Anthropology/Human development/Nursing. Experience of working under the National AIDS and STD Control Programme (NACP) facility or community settings. Lab Technician: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT)/BMLS OR Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT)/DMLS. 2 years of experience working in any diagnostic laboratory for candidates with M.Sc/B. Tech in the above mentioned subjects. Candidates with experience of working in accredited labs or those labs who have applied for accreditation will be preferred. Technical Officer: B.Sc in Microbiology/Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Life Sciences/ OR B. Tech (Biotechnology). 5 years of experience of working in any diagnostic laboratory for candidates with M.Sc/B. Tech in the above mentioned subjects. Candidates with experience of working in accredited labs or those labs who have applied for accreditation will be preferred. Laboratory Technician: B.Sc in Medical Laboratory Technology (BMLT)/BMLS OR Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology (DMLT)/DMLS. 2 years of experience working in any diagnostic laboratory for candidates with M.Sc/B. Tech in the above mentioned subjects. Candidates with experience of working in accredited labs or those labs who have applied for accreditation will be preferred. Clinical Services Officer: Bachelor's Degree in Medical or allied sciences/ Master's degree in Public Health/ Healthcare Management/ Healthcare Administration/ Social Science/ Psychology/ Applied Epidemiology / Demography / Statistics / Population Sciences. 3 years of work Experience, out of which 2 Years of experience at supervisory level in State or District in any Health Program. Data Monitoring and Documentation Officer: Master's degree in Public Health/ Healthcare Management/ Healthcare Administration/ Social Science/ Applied Epidemiology / Demography / Statistics / Bio Statistics/ Population Sciences/ Mathematics/ Economics. One year of Experience in Health or Development Sector. Cluster Prevention Officer: Master degree in Social Sciences/ Public Health/Management. 3 years of work Experience, out of which 2 Years of experience at supervisory level in State or District in any Health Program. Medical Officer: MBBS. Work experience 6 months valid registration from the respective State Medical Council/NMC. Staff Nurse: ANM. Those with diploma nursing / Bachelor of Science (Nursing) would be preferred. Minimum 3 years of experience in the field of HIV/AIDS.

salary_details.details: Deputy Director, TI/Prevention: Rs. 50,680.00 PM Dy. Director, ICTC/BSD: Rs. 50,680.00 PM Dy. Director, Lab. Serv.: Rs. 50,680.00 PM Assistant Director, ICTC/BSD: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Assistant Director, TI/Prevention: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Assistant Director, SI: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Assistant Director, IEC: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Assistant Director, Doc.: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Assistant Director YA: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Laboratory Technician: Rs. 21,000.00 PM Counsellor: Rs. 21,000.00 PM Lab Technician: Rs. 21,000.00 PM Technical Officer: Rs. 35,000.00 PM Laboratory Technician: Rs. 21,000.00 PM Clinical Services Officer: Rs. 46,800.00 PM Data Monitoring and Documentation Officer: Rs. 37,500.00 PM Cluster Prevention Officer: Rs. 45,000.00 PM Medical Officer: Rs. 72,000.00 PM Staff Nurse: Rs. 21,000.00 PM

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DSACS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 23-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DSACS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Delhi State AIDS Control Society recruitment is 23 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 31 vacancies announced for various positions in the Delhi State AIDS Control Society recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Delhi State AIDS Control Society recruitment is strictly online. No physical applications will be accepted.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for DSACS posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification ranges from a graduate degree to PhD, depending on the specific post applied for.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary range for the DSACS vacancies?
faq.answer: The salary for the positions ranges from Rs. 21,000 PM to Rs. 72,000 PM, as per the specific role and responsibilities.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Delhi State AIDS Control Society recruitment will involve a written test followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Medical Officer position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for any category of candidates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website for DSACS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website for Delhi State AIDS Control Society is https://dsacs.delhi.gov.in, where you can find more details and updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these positions?
faq.answer: All the positions announced under this recruitment drive are purely on a contract basis.
